title: Resolve final open SSRF Snyk Code finding

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Started: verify currently open SSRF finding after user rescan, identify finding ID and location, then resolve via remediation or audit-grade ignore and re-verify scan counts.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Verification results for reported remaining SSRF issue:

- Re-ran `snyk code test --include-ignores` and `snyk code test` on 2026-03-02.
- Current local CLI state shows no open issues:
  - Total: 16
  - Ignored: 16
  - Open: 0
- No SSRF finding is currently open in local CLI output for org `capacity-aqa`.

Likely explanation if UI still shows one open issue: stale project snapshot/view filter mismatch in Snyk web UI (for example: older snapshot, different branch target, or different project import).
